name: Gos Castle Runner
short_description: Run against time, jump holes and saws before time runs out. Gos Castle Runner it's a 2D platform game of running and jumping. In this game, you control a small ghost that has to pass through the castle by jumping holes and dodging saws to reach the end of the level.
detailed_description:
The Game Contains:

- 14 normal levels (1 to 14).
- 14 hard levels (1 to 14).
- 14 very hard levels (1 to 14).
- 14 extreme levels (1 to 14).
- Purchase level mode in normal and hard (1 to 14).
- Progress level mode in very hard and extreme (1 to 14).
- Dark Levels.
- Time Levels.

The game reuses the levels with less time, life(5, 3 and 1) and more obstacles.
The game has 56 levels in all.
